Author: groupsmix
Message:
Merge pull request #122 from groupsmix/devin/1775096441-fix-remaining-audit-items

fix: CSRF protection for resubscribe form + integration tests for API routes

commit 9d6e11d8e23527c31dc4ca52033158e9cf712615
Author: Devin AI <158243242+devin-ai-integration[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Date:   Thu Apr 2 02:29:41 2026 +0000

fix: CSRF protection for resubscribe form + integration tests for API routes

- 10.1: Replace plain fetch() with fetchWithCsrf() in resubscribe-form.tsx
  to prevent 403 errors in production (CSRF double-submit cookie pattern)
- 16.1: Add auth API integration tests (login validation, auth cookies,
  rate limiting, Turnstile verification, logout)
- 16.2: Add CRUD API integration tests (category CRUD with auth guard,
  validation, malformed JSON handling)
- 16.3: Add newsletter/tracking API integration tests (subscription,
  click tracking, cron auth, rate limiting)

All 38 new integration tests call actual route handlers with mocked
external dependencies (Supabase, Turnstile, rate-limit, DAL modules).

Co-Authored-By: waxpoem@rulersonline.com <waxpoem@rulersonline.com>
